item.title: Tech leads Asia losses as rollercoaster week rumbles on
item.author: AFP Englischsprachiger Basisdienst
item.description: "Early summer might turn out to be crunch time for investors as mega IPOs from the likes of SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI, as well as capital increases (such as Alphabet's $80 billion capital raising plans) and high debt issuance are likely testing investors' patience, optimism and pockets," wrote by Vincenzo Vedda at DWS.
